name: learning-notes
description: Repo to store notes of what I am learning

scripts._comment_docs_dev: Generates the slug map and then starts VitePress dev server
scripts.docs:dev: npm run generate-slug-map && npm run generate-tag-map && npm run generate-tags-page && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: npm run generate-slug-map && npm run generate-tag-map && npm run generate-tags-page && vitepress build docs
scripts.docs:preview: npm run generate-slug-map && npm run generate-tag-map && npm run generate-tags-page && vitepress preview docs
